apigatewayv2.route.CfnAbout: The `AWS::ApiGatewayV2::Route` resource creates a route for an API.

apigatewayv2.route.ApiKeyRequired.Description: Specifies whether an API key is required for the route. Supported only for WebSocket APIs.

apigatewayv2.route.AuthorizationScopes.Description: The authorization scopes supported by this route.

apigatewayv2.route.AuthorizationType.Description: The authorization type for the route. For WebSocket APIs, valid values are `NONE` for open access, `AWS_IAM` for using AWS IAM permissions, and `CUSTOM` for using a Lambda authorizer. For HTTP APIs, valid values are `NONE` for open access, `JWT` for using JSON Web Tokens, `AWS_IAM` for using AWS IAM permissions, and `CUSTOM` for using a Lambda authorizer.

apigatewayv2.route.AuthorizerId.Description: The identifier of the `Authorizer` resource to be associated with this route. The authorizer identifier is generated by API Gateway when you created the authorizer.

apigatewayv2.route.ModelSelectionExpress.Description: The model selection expression for the route. Supported only for WebSocket APIs.

apigatewayv2.route.OperationName.Description: The operation name for the route.

apigatewayv2.route.RequestModels.Description: The request models for the route. Supported only for WebSocket APIs.

apigatewayv2.route.RequestParameters.Description: The request parameters for the route. Supported only for WebSocket APIs.

apigatewayv2.route.RouteKey.Description: The route key for the route. For HTTP APIs, the route key can be either `$default`, or a combination of an HTTP method and resource path, for example, `GET /pets`.

apigatewayv2.route.RouteResponseSelectio.Description: The route response selection expression for the route. Supported only for WebSocket APIs.
